{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment assesses the mating competitiveness of male mosquitoes using two methods: a conventional mating competitiveness assay based on female fertility and a Rhodamine B (RhB)-based assay. The conventional method involves setting up mating cages with different sets of males and females, blood feeding, egg collection, and counting larvae to determine insemination status. The RhB-based method uses Rhodamine B to mark seminal fluid, allowing for the scoring of insemination status under fluorescence.",
